what_was_done: LanceDB Phase 2 complete. Migrated 6,247 docs from ChromaDB (knowledge:1402, fix_outcomes:264, observations:4579, quarantine:2). Fixed numpy truthiness bug in migration script. Tested IVF_PQ indexes — hurt relevance (Jaccard 0.403); dropped them. Flat scan: 0.973 Jaccard, 98.4% recall at 30ms/query. 44/50 queries return identical top-10.
next_steps: Re-add vector indexes when data exceeds ~50K rows
Build Claude API adapter for agent-bench (real API scoring)
Consider removing ChromaDB dependency entirely after validation period
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
LanceDB flat scan ~3x slower than ChromaDB HNSW (30ms vs 10ms) — acceptable at current scale
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
